# Bait Boards Direct

> Premium bait boards and fishing tackle accessories for serious anglers across Australia.

> Extended version: [llms-full.txt](https://www.baitboardsdirect.com/llms-full.txt)
> Last updated: 2026-05-06
> License: RSL-1.0

## About

Bait Boards Direct supplies high-quality bait boards, rod holders, and fishing accessories for Australian recreational and professional anglers. Products are sold under the SeaKing brand — 17 models ranging from AUD $408–$908, with board widths from 600mm to 830mm. All products are handcrafted from full composite fiberglass (fibreglass) for marine durability.

## Contact

- Website: https://www.baitboardsdirect.com
- Phone: 0474 332 034
- Email: info@baitboardsdirect.com.au
- Location: South East Melbourne, VIC, Australia
